steps.t: Mervárth can be found in the Trade Commission Headquarters in Lake-town. You should talk to Mervárth.
Eigár can be found in Lake-town. You should talk to Eigár.
Víthog the Forester can be found in the Dale-lands west of Lake-town. You should talk to Víthog the Forester.
The scrap pile can be found near the forester's house. You should search the scrap pile for a good piece of wood.
Málmi the Ore Trader can be found in Erebor. You should talk to Málmi.
Copper and calamine ore can be found nearby in Erebor. You should collect a chunk of copper ore and a chunk of calamine ore.
Málmi the Ore Trader can be found in Erebor. You should talk to Málmi.
Rísta can be found in Dale. You should talk to Rísta.
Dagrun can be found in the Master's manor in Lake-town. You should talk to Dagrun.
